name: neumorph-eyebrow-demo
visual_summary: A Neumorph Eyebrow is a small, rounded text component used to highlight and provide context to information. It can be used to draw attention to a specific milestone or achievement, or to indicate the importance of a particular piece of information. It is typically used as a secondary call-out to emphasize specific data points.
